questions.q: Who was identified as the suspect in the April 2026 shooting incident that led to the evacuation of the White House Correspondents' Dinner?
In April 2026, middle school students in Mississippi prevented their school bus from crashing after their driver lost consciousness due to what medical emergency?
The Supreme Court began hearing a case in April 2026 involving Okello Chatrie, whose location was tracked using a geofence warrant after he robbed a bank in which state?
Margaux Mirkin, who was assaulted and strangled during an April 2026 home invasion in the Hollywood Hills, is the heiress to which company's fortune?
In April 2026, lawmakers in which state renewed a push to pass legislation ending the practice of counties taking Social Security money owed to foster children?
